purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ImagingStudy.series.laterality` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ImagingStudy.series.laterality` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ImagingStudy.series.laterality` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `ImagingStudy.series.laterality` 0..1 `Coding`
*  R4: `ImagingStudy.series.laterality` 0..1 `Coding`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ImagingStudy.series.laterality` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ImagingStudy.series.laterality` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `ImagingStudy.series.laterality` do not cover the following types: CodeableConcept.
The mappings for `ImagingStudy.series.laterality` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: text.

element.definition: The laterality of the (possibly paired) anatomic structures examined. E.g., the left knee, both lungs, or unpaired abdomen. If present, shall be consistent with any laterality information indicated in ImagingStudy.series.bodySite.
